items.alt: Tudor-style estate with traditional warm-white holiday lighting on the rooflines, an illuminated Christmas tree, and architectural uplighting on the stone facade, with fresh snow on the ground
Stuccoed two-story home with a tall multicolor-lit Christmas tree, white-net-lit bushes along the front, and architectural uplighting on the stone facade
Large stone-and-brick estate with extensive warm-white holiday lighting outlining every roofline, lit specimen trees flanking the entry, and an illuminated paver driveway approach
Residential driveway at night flanked by uplit landscape plantings, path lights, and warm-toned beds — landscape lighting installation
Brick two-story home with classic warm-white roofline holiday lighting, stone window arches, and lit shrubbery at the foundation
Brick home with warm-white roofline holiday lighting, illuminated front shrub, and uplighting on the facade
Cedar-and-stone lake home at night with architectural uplighting on the chimney and gables, and uplit specimen trees in the surrounding lawn
Twilight view of a front lawn with uplit blue spruce specimens, stone-edged planting bed, and pathway lights along a stone-edged garden
Backyard at twilight with a tall uplit white birch tree, stone-bordered planting beds, and a fire pit area with path lighting
Mature maple tree uplit at twilight with lawn-bed path lighting along a stone-edged border
Stone-bordered planting bed with mature shrubs, uplit by warm low-voltage lights, adjoining a paver patio with seasonal container plantings
Stone-walled raised planting bed with variegated hostas and seasonal flowers, with a path light illuminating the path edge
Stone-bordered planting bed beside a paver walkway, with a path light, container plantings, and a backdrop of mature shrubs
Backyard at twilight with a tall uplit birch tree, stone-bordered raised planting bed, and path lighting along a paver edge
Stone-and-shingle home at dusk with warm-white holiday lighting outlining the rooflines and gables
